##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Gunnar Farber
##DESCRIPTION=Aggregates of bladed brownish-orange crystals, associated with natrolite, aegerine, analcime, nepheline, and microcline. Type specimen.

##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R130421
